015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot;
018
019import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.*;
020import org.springframework.boot.builder.*;
021import org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.*;
022import org.springframework.context.annotation.*;
023import org.springframework.stereotype.*;
024
025import jakarta.servlet.*;
026
027/**
028 * Petstore Spring Boot deployment entry point.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Boots a Spring Boot embedded servlet container, wires {@link RootResources} as a Spring bean, and mounts it at
032 * {@code /*} via {@link ServletRegistrationBean}.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Provides a {@code @Bean HelloMessageProvider} to demonstrate Spring {@code @Autowired} injection into the
036 * companion {@link HelloResource} child — preserving the deployment-glue Spring-injection demo.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstore">juneau-petstore</a>
040 * </ul>
041 */
042@SuppressWarnings({
043   "resource" // ApplicationContext is owned by Spring; not a leak.
044})
045@SpringBootApplication
046@Controller
047public class App {
048
049   /**
050    * Entry point.
051    *
052    * @param args Command-line arguments forwarded to Spring Boot.
053    */
054   public static void main(String[] args) {
055      new SpringApplicationBuilder(App.class).run(args);
056   }
057
058   /**
059    * Spring-injected message provider consumed by {@link HelloResource}.
060    *
061    * @return The hello-message provider bean.
062    */
063   @Bean
064   public HelloMessageProvider helloMessageProvider() {
065      return new HelloMessageProvider("Hello from Spring-injected bean!");
066   }
067
068   /**
069    * Returns {@link HelloResource} as a Spring bean with its dependency injected via constructor.
070    *
071    * @param helloMessageProvider The Spring-managed message provider bean.
072    * @return The hello-world REST resource.
073    */
074   @Bean
075   public HelloResource helloResource(HelloMessageProvider helloMessageProvider) {
076      return new HelloResource(helloMessageProvider);
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Returns the root router as a Spring bean so child resources resolve as Spring beans.
081    *
082    * @return The root router REST resource.
083    */
084   @Bean
085   public RootResources rootResources() {
086      return new RootResources();
087   }
088
089   /**
090    * Mounts the root router servlet at {@code /*}.
091    *
092    * @param rootResources The Spring-managed root router.
093    * @return The servlet registration mapped to {@code /*}.
094    */
095   @Bean
096   public ServletRegistrationBean<Servlet> rootServlet(RootResources rootResources) {
097      return new ServletRegistrationBean<>(rootResources, "/*");
098   }
099}
